changed_construction_audit.plain_language_claim: Source-attested Cantonese examples support repeated property material followed by overt 咁／噉 before a following action VP; unrestricted productivity and the bare repeated-property route remain unresolved.

sources.citation: Leung, H. H. 2014. Cantonese Coverbs: A Syntactic Reanalysis.
鄭定歐、張勵妍、高石英. 2021. 粵語（香港話）教程（修訂版）.

unresolved_questions: Which repeated property forms and predicate classes participate productively?
Is the bare 慢慢 + V route independently supported?
What negative boundaries distinguish manner-adverbial 噉 from discourse-marker uses?

implementation_validation: The source-linked regression 佢慢慢噉食飯。 passes with full root coverage, overt 噉 preserved, and ProductiveVO retained as the nested predicate. The 546-case regression suite, 43-case NP suite, and 1,223 construction assertions pass through the core profile.
linguistic_confidence: MannerAdverbialVP is research_pending only. The sources support the overt repeated-manner + 咁／噉 shape, but do not establish unrestricted productivity, bare-form licensing, negative boundaries, or speaker-panel acceptance.
overclaim_review_scope: Separated the new source-linked overt-adverbializer case from the pre-existing zero-weight bare 慢慢行 reachability probe; preserved discourse uses of 咁／噉 and made no productive promotion claim.
unresolved_release_questions: Manner-adverbial negative boundaries and panel evidence remain absent.
RUL and PFV survey integration remains paused while collection proceeds.
